notes: Part 3/9 armed: dialogue-panel (CheffyPanel.astro full client-side dialogue runtime + real cheffy-dialogue.json tree + action-dispatch registry) -- RESEARCH -> PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST (AUDIT auto). Seam: CheffyPanel currently SERVER-renders only the start node; part 3 makes it navigate the whole nodes map CLIENT-side, drives the mascot per node via the part-2 cheffySetState hook on #cheffy, and defines the action-dispatch REGISTRY (data-action -> handler + graceful default) that parts 4/5/6 plug their handler into. OWNS + fully implements: close + navigate-to-archive + free-text search resolution against existing /archive/[slug] routes. Boundary: do NOT implement generate-ics/trigger-permission/export-checklist logic (parts 4/5/6 register handlers), do NOT mount <Cheffy /> in Layout (part 9), do NOT touch cheffyCalendar.ts/public/sw.js/GroceryList.astro, do NOT regress part-2 open/close/state behavior, do NOT add motion that breaks prefers-reduced-motion (part 7). Pure traversal + search-matcher logic goes in a zero-relative-import util (cheffyState.ts / cheffyCalendar.ts pattern) so TEST verifies with an ephemeral Node script; npm run build (astro check && astro build) stays the durable gate. Director re-arms part 4 (calendar-actions) after this part audits: calendar-actions registers the generate-ics handler into the part-3 registry + wires cheffyCalendar.ts ICS download / per-recipe mini export / Google Calendar link.
